name: 螺旋手里剑
description: 对2格内一名敌人造成攻击力200%的物理伤害，并沉默目标1回合
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; var target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 2, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) return target; if (target.currentHp <= 0) return { success: false, message: '目标已死亡' }; var dmg = caster.attack * 2; dealDamage(caster, target, dmg, 'physical', battle); if (target.currentHp <= 0) return { success: true, message: caster.name + '对' + target.name + '释放螺旋手里剑，造成' + dmg + '点伤害' }; if (!target.statusTags) target.statusTags = []; var already = target.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'silenced'; }); if (!already) { target.statusTags.push({ id: 'silenced-' + target.instanceId, type: 'silenced', name: '沉默', visible: true, remainingDuration: 1, remainingUses: -1, intensity: 1, stacks: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-silenced-block'] }); addRuleById(target.instanceId, 'rule-silenced-block'); } return { success: true, message: caster.name + '对' + target.name + '释放螺旋手里剑，造成' + dmg + '点伤害并沉默1回合' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对2格内敌人造成攻击力×2物理伤害并沉默1回合', expectedValues: { '伤害': piece.attack * 2 } }; }
